title: MCLN EX07 Cigarette Case Pick Replenishment Configuration Guide
fullText:
EX07 – Cigarette Case Pick Replenishment CONFIGURATION GUIDE Contents TOC \o "1-3" \h \z \u EX07 Cigarette Case Pick Custom Screen Configurations PAGEREF _Toc43485285 \h 3 1.1 System Codes Configuration – Add C-000-000 Global Extension C trl , C-000-EX07 Extension Ctrl PAGEREF _Toc43485286 \h 3 1.1.1 Adding Global Extension Code ID to the global extension PAGEREF _Toc43485287 \h 3 1.2 Trans Par m s Configuration – Add 35 Pck iLPN Frm CP Byte 500-500, 40 Fill Actv Byte 500-500 PAGEREF _Toc43485291 \h 6 1.2.1 Adding 35 Pck iLPN Frm CP Byte 500-500 PAGEREF _Toc43485292 \h 6 1.2.1 Adding 40 Fill Actv Byte 500-500 PAGEREF _Toc43485293 \h 9 1.3 Error Message Configuration – Messages UI, select Message Master PAGEREF _Toc43485294 \h 11 1.3.1 Configuring Error Message PAGEREF _Toc43485295 \h 11 EX0 7 Cigarette Case Pick Custom Screen Configurations Follow below steps to configure Cigarette Case Pick Replenishment System Codes Configuration – Add C-000-000 Global Extension Control , C-000-EX0 7 Extension Control Adding Global Extension Code ID to the global extension Navigate to the System codes UI and search for code type 000 Select Global E xtension C ontrol Input the below information if not already configured and “Save” Select Parameters Add in following information and hit “Save” Select Code IDs Click “Add” Input the below information and “Save” Click “Add” Input the below information and “Save” Select C-000-EX07 Open the “Parameters Tab” Check the Y/N Flag and “Save” Transaction Parameters Configuration – Add 35 Pck iLPN Frm CP Byte 500-500, 40 Fill Actv Byte 500-500 Adding 35 Pck iLPN Frm CP Byte 500-500 ( THIS SHOULD BE FOR THE CIGARETTE SPECIFIC PCK ILPN FRM CP TRANSACTION. IN MK THIS IS PCK ILPN FRM CP-CIG ) Open Transaction Parameters UI, search for “Pck iLPN Frm CP” under transaction name. Click on “Pck iLPN Frm CP” transaction and click on “Program Template” on the bottom right C lick “Add” Enter in the following information so it looks like the image below Hit “Save” Click the blue “back” arrow on the top left, click again on the “Pck iLPN Frm CP” transactio n Select “Parameters” tab and c lick “Edit” Check the “ 500-500 ” EX07 Enable Y/N flag and “save” Adding 40 Fill Actv Byte 500-500 ( THIS SHOULD BE FOR THE CIGARETTE SPECIFIC FILL ACTV TRANSACTION. IN MK THIS IS FILL ACTV -CIG ) Open Transaction Parameters UI, search for “Fill Actv” under transaction name Click on “Fill Actv – CIG ” transaction and click on “Program Template ” on the bottom right corner C lick “Add” Enter in the below information then click “Save ” Click the blue “back” arrow on the top left, click again on the “Fill Active” transaction C lick “Edit” Check the “500-500 EX07 Enable” flag and hit “ S ave” Error Message Configuration – Messages UI, select Message Master Configur ing Error Message Enter “Messages” UI Module   Message ID   Message Class   Message Type   Message Detail Value   CUST  0701  System  Error  Task Qty not Divisible by Pack  CUST   0702   System   Error   LPN already scanned   Click on “ Message Master ” S elect + sign to add new message and configure per below (Text value in EX0 7 Extension Spec as well)

EX07 – Cigarette Case Pick Replenishment CONFIGURATION GUIDE Contents  EX07 Cigarette Case Pick Custom Screen Configurations  1.1 System Codes Configuration – Add C-000-000 Global Extension C trl , C-000-EX07 Extension Ctrl  1.1.1 Adding Global Extension Code ID to the global extension  1.2 Trans Par m s Configuration – Add 35 Pck iLPN Frm CP Byte 500-500, 40 Fill Actv Byte 500-500  1.2.1 Adding 35 Pck iLPN Frm CP Byte 500-500  1.2.1 Adding 40 Fill Actv Byte 500-500  1.3 Error Message Configuration – Messages UI, select Message Master  1.3.1 Configuring Error Message  EX0 7 Cigarette Case Pick Custom Screen Configurations Follow below steps to configure Cigarette Case Pick Replenishment System Codes Configuration – Add C-000-000 Global Extension Control , C-000-EX0 7 Extension Control Adding Global Extension Code ID to the global extension Navigate to the System codes UI and search for code type 000 Select Global E xtension C ontrol Input the below information if not already configured and “Save” Select Parameters Add in following information and hit “Save” Select Code IDs Click “Add” Input the below information and “Save” Click “Add” Input the below information and “Save” Select C-000-EX07 Open the “Parameters Tab” Check the Y/N Flag and “Save” Transaction Parameters Configuration – Add 35 Pck iLPN Frm CP Byte 500-500, 40 Fill Actv Byte 500-500 Adding 35 Pck iLPN Frm CP Byte 500-500 ( THIS SHOULD BE FOR THE CIGARETTE SPECIFIC PCK ILPN FRM CP TRANSACTION. IN MK THIS IS PCK ILPN FRM CP-CIG ) Open Transaction Parameters UI, search for “Pck iLPN Frm CP” under transaction name. Click on “Pck iLPN Frm CP” transaction and click on “Program Template” on the bottom right C lick “Add” Enter in the following information so it looks like the image below Hit “Save” Click the blue “back” arrow on the top left, click again on the “Pck iLPN Frm CP” transactio n Select “Parameters” tab and c lick “Edit” Check the “ 500-500 ” EX07 Enable Y/N flag and “save” Adding 40 Fill Actv Byte 500-500 ( THIS SHOULD BE FOR THE CIGARETTE SPECIFIC FILL ACTV TRANSACTION.

IN MK THIS IS FILL ACTV -CIG ) Open Transaction Parameters UI, search for “Fill Actv” under transaction name Click on “Fill Actv – CIG ” transaction and click on “Program Template ” on the bottom right corner C lick “Add” Enter in the below information then click “Save ” Click the blue “back” arrow on the top left, click again on the “Fill Active” transaction C lick “Edit” Check the “500-500 EX07 Enable” flag and hit “ S ave” Error Message Configuration – Messages UI, select Message Master Configur ing Error Message Enter “Messages” UI Module   Message ID   Message Class   Message Type   Message Detail Value   CUST  0701  System  Error  Task Qty not Divisible by Pack  CUST   0702   System   Error   LPN already scanned   Click on “ Message Master ” S elect + sign to add new message and configure per below (Text value in EX0 7 Extension Spec as well)
